page_content:
Prerequisite: ITAL207.

ITAL362 Survey of Italian Society and Culture: From the 1980s to thePresent Day (3 Credits)

Development of Italian society and culture from the 1980s to the present. Literature, cinema, economy, popular culture, daily life. Taught in Italian. Prerequisite: ITAL207; or permission of ARHU-School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures department.
